visual_description: A man in a blue plaid shirt stands facing another person partially visible in a pink plaid shirt, gesturing with his right hand. The man in the plaid shirt has short dark hair and looks toward the other person. The scene is indoors with framed artwork on the wall and a wooden door in the background.
